metadata.title: Pricing
metadata.description: Choose a PicShip plan built for product-image production

pricing.title: Choose the pace that fits your image workflow
pricing.description: Every plan is shaped around ecommerce hero images, PDP visuals, and ad creatives. Prices have been lowered by $60 across the board.

items.title: Starter
items.description: Best for testing a product, creating your first listings, and validating a visual direction quickly.
features: 120 credits, valid for 30 days
Generate hero images, clean-background images, and simple scene shots
Built-in styles for clean ecommerce, luxury ad, natural lifestyle, and tech launch
Common ecommerce ratios including 1:1, 4:5, and 9:16
Reuse the same style presets from the home page and showcase gallery
Generation history with re-editing
items.tip: A great starting point for your first product batch.

items.title: Growth
items.description: Best for regular launches, PDP visuals, and ad creative production for an active store.
items.label: Popular
features: 360 credits, valid for 90 days
More background combinations and stronger scene direction coverage
Better suited for creating hero, landscape ad, and campaign variants of the same product
Showcase inspiration can be sent directly into the workspace
More room to test multiple cover directions across several products
Priority email support
items.tip: The most balanced option for steady image production.

items.title: Studio
items.description: Best for brands preparing larger campaigns, seasonal pushes, and multi-category creative stock.
features: 900 credits, valid for 365 days
More room to build and reuse product-specific prompt systems
Better fit for larger annual image libraries and campaign planning
Designed for sustained iteration across launches and promotions
Higher-volume creation capacity
Priority support
items.tip: Built for teams treating product imagery as an ongoing capability.

items.title: Starter
items.description: Best for smaller monthly launch cycles and hero image refreshes.
features: 150 credits every month
Four product-image styles and core background presets
Exports in common ecommerce ratios
Generation history
A lightweight fit for a single store or brand
items.tip: The easiest way to keep creating each month.

items.title: Growth
items.description: Best for steady launches, cover testing, and recurring ad creative updates.
items.label: Popular
features: 420 credits every month
Richer scene and composition directions
Better suited for testing multiple hero directions for the same SKU
Jump from inspiration cases straight into the generator workspace
A stronger fit for small teams with regular output needs
items.tip: The most practical tier for most stores and operators.

items.title: Studio
items.description: Best for teams producing launch images, campaign assets, and ads at a higher volume.
features: 960 credits every month
More headroom for multi-category, high-frequency creation
Supports ongoing refreshes for campaigns and promotional cycles
Larger testing and iteration capacity
Priority support
items.tip: A strong fit when image production becomes part of daily ops.

items.title: Starter
items.description: Best for maintaining a lightweight product-image workflow across the year.
features: 1800 credits every year
Core styles and backgrounds for year-round use
A good fit for maintaining one store's base image library
Lower annual cost
items.tip: Lock in the lowest annual cost.

items.title: Growth
items.description: Best for teams that keep a consistent pace of product refreshes and campaign work all year.
items.label: Popular
features: 5040 credits every year
Better fit for launches, redesigns, and recurring campaign visuals
Enough room to keep testing multiple style directions
Helps formalize product-image production into a repeatable workflow
items.tip: The best fit for long-term, steady image output.

items.title: Studio
items.description: Best for teams that want hero images, PDP visuals, and ad creatives under one annual production budget.
features: 11520 credits every year
Built for heavy promotion calendars and multi-category product lines
More iteration space and a stronger annual creative reserve
Priority support
items.tip: A stronger annual setup for serious visual production.
